title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 377.290 - Distribution of surplus
text:
377.290.  Distribution of surplus. — Any corporation, company or association may provide for a return of any surplus accumulations on its limited payment or investment policies, which may be returned as a dividend, or in extended, paid-up or increased insurance.
(RSMo 1939 § 5878) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 5767; 1919 § 6177; 1909 § 6971
